# Bare-minimum Hyprland session (no dotfiles).
# Just enough that Hyprland's stock auto-generated config is actually usable:
# its default keybinds launch a terminal (kitty) and a launcher (wofi).

hyprland                      # the compositor
xdg-desktop-portal-hyprland   # screenshare / file pickers under Hyprland
hyprpolkitagent               # polkit auth prompts (password dialogs)
qt5-wayland                   # Qt apps render natively on Wayland
qt6-wayland
